title: CILogBench diagnoser config
description: Fixed-configuration for an M6 experiment run. Committed under configs/diagnosers/. The config is SHA-256 hashed into the experiment manifest so results can be reproduced; any change to the config invalidates the diagnosis cache.

diagnoser_name.description: Stable slug used in result paths. Must not contain API keys, account IDs, or private endpoints.

command_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the shim command string (e.g. DIAGNOSIS_COMMAND).

prompt_path.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the debugger prompt file.

env_var_name.description: Per Codex 2026-05-12 F2: optional env-var name whose value overrides model_name at run time. The runner uses this when validating cache hits so documented env overrides remain idempotent.

temperature.description: May be null for reasoning-class models (e.g. gpt-5-mini) whose API ignores temperature. Use null when the shim does not send the value, not 0 (which is a valid setting the shim WOULD send to a non-reasoning provider).

deterministic.description: False when the provider does not support deterministic decoding; the M6 report should surface this.

on_context_too_large.description: provider_error: the shim exits non-zero and the runner records metadata.provider_error=unsupported_context_too_large. Added 2026-05-13 per Codex F3 (the v3 config used this since 2026-05-11 but the schema only allowed the legacy two values).

allow_truncation.description: Must be false for M6. Silent truncation is forbidden; implement truncation as a separate context method instead.
